examples: This paper mainly presents the PLC application in control of the coke riddling process.

Close encounters between swerving young stars might help spawn the brown dwarfs riddling the Milky Way.
The pigeon houses riddling the rock faces, traditionally used to collect the birds' droppings for use as fertiliser, mostly stand empty.
